'''dhashuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetosema|chaetosema]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetosema|chaetosema]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhashuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæshiwith|dhæshiwith]] || [[word:dhæshiwij|dhæshiwij]] || [[word:dhæshiwish|dhæshiwish]] || [[word:dhæshiwi|dhæshiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhashushuwuth|dhashushuwuth]] || [[word:dhashushuwuj|dhashushuwuj]] || [[word:dhashushuwush|dhashushuwush]] || [[word:dhashushuwu|dhashushuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhashuwuth|dhashuwuth]] || [[word:dhashuwuj|dhashuwuj]] || [[word:dhashuwush|dhashuwush]] || [[word:dhashuwu|dhashuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhashufwuth|dhashufwuth]] || [[word:dhashufwuj|dhashufwuj]] || [[word:dhashufwush|dhashufwush]] || [[word:dhashufwuf|dhashufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhashuwuthu|dhashuwuthu]] || [[word:dhashuwuju|dhashuwuju]] || [[word:dhashuwushu|dhashuwushu]] || [[word:dhashuwuku|dhashuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhashuwuth|dhashuwuth]] || [[word:dhashuwuj|dhashuwuj]] || [[word:dhashuwush|dhashuwush]] || [[word:dhashuwu|dhashuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhashuwuthul|dhashuwuthul]] || [[word:dhashuwujul|dhashuwujul]] || [[word:dhashuwushul|dhashuwushul]] || [[word:dhashuwukul|dhashuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhashuwuthuthu|dhashuwuthuthu]] || [[word:dhashuwujuju|dhashuwujuju]] || [[word:dhashuwushushu|dhashuwushushu]] || [[word:dhashuwuku|dhashuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhashuwuthun|dhashuwuthun]] || [[word:dhashuwujun|dhashuwujun]] || [[word:dhashuwushun|dhashuwushun]] || [[word:dhashuwukun|dhashuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhashuwuthuoro|dhashuwuthuoro]] || [[word:dhashuwujuoro|dhashuwujuoro]] || [[word:dhashuwushuoro|dhashuwushuoro]] || [[word:dhashuwukuoro|dhashuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
